TG_BOT_TOKEN.description: Telegram Bot token. Create a bot via https://t.me/BotFather (send /newbot)

TG_CHAT_ID.description: Your Telegram chat ID. Send a message to your bot, then visit https://api.telegram.org/bot<TOKEN>/getUpdates

PWD_KEY.description: Encryption key for password manager. Generate with: openssl rand -hex 32
